naics_sectors.title: Agriculture, Forestry, Fishing and Hunting
naics_sectors.description: Industries engaged in growing crops, raising animals, harvesting timber, and harvesting fish and other animals from farms or natural habitats.

naics_sectors.title: Mining, Quarrying, and Oil and Gas Extraction
naics_sectors.description: Industries that extract naturally occurring minerals, oil, and gas; includes quarrying, drilling, and support services.

naics_sectors.title: Utilities
naics_sectors.description: Electric power, natural gas, water supply, and sewage system providers delivering essential utility services.

naics_sectors.title: Construction
naics_sectors.description: Industries involved in building structures, heavy civil engineering, and specialized trade contracting.

naics_sectors.title: Manufacturing
naics_sectors.description: Industries that transform raw materials into new products through mechanical, physical, or chemical processes.

naics_sectors.title: Wholesale Trade
naics_sectors.description: Businesses engaged in selling goods in large quantities to retailers, industrial users, or other wholesalers.

naics_sectors.title: Retail Trade
naics_sectors.description: Businesses that sell merchandise in small quantities directly to consumers through stores or online channels.

naics_sectors.title: Transportation and Warehousing
naics_sectors.description: Industries providing transportation of passengers and cargo, warehousing, storage, and logistics services.

naics_sectors.title: Information
naics_sectors.description: Industries that produce, distribute, or process information, including media, telecommunications, and data services.

naics_sectors.title: Finance and Insurance
naics_sectors.description: Industries involved in financial transactions, banking, investment, insurance, and risk pooling.

naics_sectors.title: Real Estate and Rental and Leasing
naics_sectors.description: Industries that rent, lease, or manage real estate and tangible assets such as equipment or vehicles.

naics_sectors.title: Professional, Scientific, and Technical Services
naics_sectors.description: Industries offering specialized professional services such as legal, accounting, engineering, consulting, and research.

naics_sectors.title: Management of Companies and Enterprises
naics_sectors.description: Holding companies and corporate headquarters that oversee and manage other establishments.

naics_sectors.title: Administrative and Support and Waste Management and Remediation Services
naics_sectors.description: Industries providing support services such as staffing, facilities management, security, cleaning, and waste remediation.

naics_sectors.title: Educational Services
naics_sectors.description: Schools, training centers, and institutions providing instruction and educational support services.

naics_sectors.title: Health Care and Social Assistance
naics_sectors.description: Industries providing medical care, social assistance, and support services for individuals and families.

naics_sectors.title: Arts, Entertainment, and Recreation
naics_sectors.description: Industries providing cultural, entertainment, and recreational services such as museums, theaters, and fitness centers.

naics_sectors.title: Accommodation and Food Services
naics_sectors.description: Industries providing lodging, meals, and beverages for immediate consumption.

naics_sectors.title: Other Services (except Public Administration)
naics_sectors.description: Miscellaneous service industries such as repair services, personal care, and nonprofit organizations.

naics_sectors.title: Public Administration
naics_sectors.description: Federal, state, and local government agencies administering public programs and services.
